problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photodynamic. Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors directly addresses this.
